notes: Both modules should expose compile at the top level.
Both modules should expose search at the top level.
Both modules should expose purge so cache-management smoke tests can run.
The scaffold keeps purge as a safe no-op that mirrors stdlib return shape.
Rebar now returns a narrow Pattern scaffold from compile so later scorecards can observe compiled-pattern metadata.
Rebar now returns a concrete Match scaffold for tiny literal-only search calls.
Escape now provides a real CPython-compatible helper for representative string inputs.

Pins the no-match behavior for module-level match when the string starts later.
Exercises fullmatch truthiness and the minimal literal Match payload for str results.
Mirrors the str literal fullmatch success case with bytes payloads and bytes-typed group(0).
